package rulecoverage

func PositiveRequestIdGenerationDuplicatedOutsideMiddleware() string {
    ruleID := "request_id_generation_duplicated_outside_middleware"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated request-id creation logic spread across handlers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
